title: The New Haircut
content: Sophia decided it was time for a new haircut after many months. On Saturday afternoon, she visited a salon near her apartment. She showed the hairstylist a photo on her phone and explained what she wanted. While the stylist worked, Sophia listened to conversations and music around the salon. When the haircut was finished, she looked at herself in the mirror and smiled. The shorter style made her feel fresh and confident. Later that evening, several friends complimented her new look during dinner.
